creator: rodrigosloop@gmail.com
text:
With your permission I will re-open the issue; updating the kmod ports improved the situation, but the kernel is still crashing.

I've uploaded the most recent crash dumps to http://antares-labs.eu/isometric/fbsd-13.2-release.crashdumps.8.txz

I'm doing my best to understand what's going on. If there's anything else I could provide to help you figure this out, please let me know.

Thinking of moving this system to -stable, but I want to make sure I've tried all I could, since I very much prefer the stability of -release.
